name: Peppermint Jelly Candy
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (3 oz each) liquid fruit pectin
recipeInstructions:
For best results, follow the directions carefully to avoid undercooking the mixtures. No candy thermometer is necessary for this classic candy.
Line an 8-inch square pan with foil, buttering it well.
In a small saucepan, combine water and pectin. Stir in baking soda.
In a medium saucepan, combine 1 cup sugar and corn syrup. Cook both mixtures over high heat until foam forms on the pectin mixture and the sugar mixture reaches a full rolling boil (a boil that cannot be stirred down), about 3 to 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
Slowly pour the pectin mixture into the sugar mixture, stirring constantly. Continue boiling for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Remove from heat; stir in peppermint extract and food coloring.
Pour into foil-lined pan. Cool until firm.
Remove candy from pan by lifting foil. With a wet knife or scissors, cut into small pieces or desired shapes. Roll in sugar.
Store loosely covered.
Yield: 64 candies
